productDisplayName: Baggit Women Magenta Voltage Sapera Wallet
description: Style NoteWorry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit and drop it into your messy hold-all. This piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag.Product DetailsMagenta leatherette with one main zipped compartmentStitched detailing on the front with buckle Twelve card holders, two insert pockets and one compartment with a zippered separator on the centre foldBranding at the backEasy to grip, synthetic leather zip pullMaterial and CareLeatheretteWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtSizeLength: 10 cmsWidth: 20 cms
